states.name: Ludmilla
states.title: Knight of the Holy Eve
states.description:
Inside the castle, the party continues, with food, chatter, and the clink of glasses. But Ludmilla finds herself outside, alone, her cheeks and nose reddened by the cold. A clinging dress, uncomfortable high heels... "What am I doing in these? They don't suit me at all..." Her sigh is white mist in the frozen night.
"That's not true at all, Miss." Hearing a soft voice and footsteps behind her, she turns.

states.name: Ludmilla
states.title: Knight of the Holy Eve
states.description:
Ludmilla sighs as Clarice pours her another flute of champagne. "A Marshal should never drink on duty..."
"You aren't on duty now. Why not indulge, just for tonight?" Ludmilla can't argue with that, and picks up her glass. Pleasant drink and pleasant company while the hours away.

states.name: Ludmilla
states.title: Knight of the Holy Eve
states.description:
Ludmilla's plan to put her tipsy maid to bed goes awry. "Miss, Miss∼!"
"Ah! Clarice, stop wiggling!"
"I love you so much, Ludmilla. Won't you stay with me tonight!?"
"T-too close!"
While wrestling with Clarice is exhausting, the melancholy she had felt just a few hours before has completely vanished.
